message:

echo "---"
grep -n "prdata.*apb0\|apb0.*prdata\|PREADY.*apb0\|pready.*apb0" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -20
